violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Food contact surfaces of the "F'real" machine were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
Inspector observed unpackaged donuts in a self service case without a list of ingredients/allergens. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

The door to the outside, located in the retail area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the lowboy freezer and counter behind soda machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/18/2025

The floors in the walk-in coolers and under retail shelves have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/04/2025

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC informed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2023

The door to the outside, located in the entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/27/2023
